title: Ability to "Pause" a board
excerpt:
Our organization has roughly 100 projects running at any given time. 
For one reason or another we have projects that need paused for a period of time.  We do not want to delete the project or delete the due dates of the…

posts.author: bmauch (Ben Mauch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our organization has roughly 100 projects running at any given time.
For one reason or another we have projects that need paused for a period of time. We do not want to delete the project or delete the due dates of the tasks as we have roughly 200 tasks all with preset dates that relate back to a key start date.

It would be ideal if there was a switch to flip to have the board be paused, keep the timeline dates that power our users’ My Work sections, without requiring them to manage selecting and unselecting project boards all the time.

posts.author: giselle4343 (Giselle Seoane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same request in a more recent post: Put a project "on hold"

I really wish they would make this a feature. Really time consuming to go through and select all the open items on a board to mass edit to on hold and then go back later to put them back. It’s better if the whole project goes on hold and removes from my work any open tasks associated with that board. Then when the go ahead is given to start working again, the PM can go to the board and update the dates, then remove the on hold status on the board so the items show back up on the users my work area with new dates.
